name: SOBR Safe, Inc.
business: SOBR Safe, Inc. provides non-invasive alcohol tracking solutions through its SOBRsafe software platform and hardware devices SOBRcheck and SOBRsure. The company sells to behavioral wellness, commercial environments, and individual consumers. It operates as a single segment with sales through channel partners and direct sales.
sellsTo: Commercial environments including oil and gas, fleet management, telematics, ride share programs, general workplace safety
Individual consumer use including co-parenting trust and personal accountability

exposures.sentence: The wearable band is a device which includes a contained sensor which senses alcohol contained in perspiration released through the pores of the skin.

We have begun executing a strategic initiative to expand beyond our core cloud-based personal alcohol awareness tracking solutions to establish a broader presence within the health and wellness ecosystem.
